text: Show me which CLAUDE.md takes precedence right now

blocks.text:
Configuration ladder (highest precedence first):
  1. CLI flag           --claude-md ./override.md      (not set)
  2. ENV var            CLAUDE_MD_PATH=...             (not set)
  3. project root       ./CLAUDE.md                    (active — 2.4kB)
  4. user scope         ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md            (active — 1.1kB, MERGED below project)
  5. system default     embedded                       (always active)

Result: project ./CLAUDE.md takes precedence; user scope is merged below.
